transcript.message: Hello, it's wonderful to connect with you today. My name is Rohan, and I'm a recruiter with a growing fintech company. I came across your profile and was impressed with your experience in AI engineering, so I'm excited to learn more about your background. Can you start by telling me a bit about your current role and what you've been working on lately?

Hello Rohan, nice to connect with you as well. Currently, I'm working as a Mechanical Engineer at Hooli, which might seem unrelated to AI engineering, but I've been able to apply my skills in areas like fine-tuning LLMs and working with microservices. Lately, I've been involved in projects that utilize technologies like Airflow, Terraform, and Docker, and I've also been exploring the applications of semantic search and vector search in our systems.

That's fascinating, it sounds like you've been able to apply your skills in creative ways despite being in a mechanical engineering role. I'm particularly intrigued by your interest in semantic search and vector search, as those are areas that are highly relevant to the role I'm recruiting for. What sparked your interest in this specific opportunity for a Senior AI Engineer position in the fintech domain?

I've always been drawn to the potential of AI and machine learning to drive innovation, and my experience with fine-tuning LLMs and working with microservices has given me a solid foundation to explore these interests further. The fintech domain, in particular, seems like a space where AI can have a significant impact, and I'm interested in learning more about how the company is leveraging these technologies to drive business outcomes. My background in mechanical engineering has also given me a unique perspective on problem-solving, and I'm excited about the possibility of bringing this perspective to a role that's more focused on AI engineering.

It's great to hear that you're excited about the potential of AI in the fintech domain, and I think your unique background could definitely bring a fresh perspective to our team. As we discuss this opportunity further, I'd like to get a sense of what you're looking for in terms of compensation - what are your salary expectations for a Senior AI Engineer role like this one?

My salary expectation for a Senior AI Engineer role is ₹0L per annum. I'm open to discussing the overall compensation package and how it aligns with industry standards, considering factors like benefits, bonuses, and growth opportunities. I'd appreciate it if you could share more about the company's approach to compensation and what I can expect in this role.

I appreciate your transparency about your salary expectations, and I'm happy to discuss the overall compensation package with you in more detail later on. Before we dive deeper into that, I'd like to know more about your current situation - what's your current notice period, and when would you be available to join a new organization if everything aligns?

My current notice period is 60 days, which I'm committed to honoring if I decide to move forward with the opportunity. I'm eager to learn more about the company's expectations and timeline for onboarding a new team member, and I'm confident that we can work together to ensure a smooth transition.

Now that we've discussed your notice period and availability, I'd love to give you a better understanding of what to expect from our team and the role. Can you tell me, what questions do you have about the Senior AI Engineer position or the team I'll be working with if you were to join our organization?

I do have a few questions about the role and the team. Could you tell me more about the specific projects and initiatives that the Senior AI Engineer will be working on, and how they contribute to the company's overall goals? Additionally, I'd like to know more about the team's dynamics and what a typical day looks like for someone in this position. What are the biggest challenges that the team is currently facing, and how do you see this role helping to address them?

It was an absolute pleasure speaking with you and learning more about your background and interests. I appreciate the time you took to share your thoughts and answer my questions, and I'm excited about the possibility of having you join our team. I'll be in touch within the next few days to discuss the next steps and provide more information about the role and our company. Until then, thank you again for your time, and I wish you all the best - I look forward to being in touch soon.

It was a pleasure speaking with you as well, Rohan. I appreciate the time you took to discuss the opportunity and answer my questions. I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon and learning more about the next steps. Thank you again for your time, and I wish you all the best as well.
